title: Benchmark summary made operators open raw JSON to find the governed run id
description: The benchmark CLI and report surface exposed the benchmark run id but not the linked governed run id directly, so the operator had to inspect `benchmark.run.json` to follow the underlying evidence.
reproductionNotes: Run `pnpm gdh benchmark run fresh-tests-dashboard-loading-wait --ci-safe --json` and compare the top-level CLI summary with the underlying benchmark artifact.
suspectedCause: The benchmark operator summary emphasizes score and case counts but omits one of the most important drill-down identifiers.
